description: AgDR-0080 source filter — drug-safety question excludes CDC-ACIP. The keyword classifier in evidence_retriever_node sees 'safe' / 'contraindication' / 'dose' / 'interact' and restricts retrieval to {FDA, ACC-AHA, ADA, HMS-LOE}. ACIP's vaccine schedules have nothing to say about metformin renal dosing or warfarin INR monitoring — including them in the candidate pool would (a) cost reranker slots that should go to drug-relevant chunks and (b) potentially seed the synthesizer with a misleading vaccine-vs-drug crossover citation.
what_bug_this_catches: If the drug-safety branch of the question classifier is broken or the {FDA, ACC-AHA, ADA, HMS-LOE} allow-list silently includes 'CDC-ACIP', drug-safety queries pull in vaccine schedule chunks. The eval asserts no chunk in the result has source_organization='CDC-ACIP'. Combined with the vaccine_acip_only case above, the two together pin both directions of the classifier (vaccine→ACIP-only AND drug-safety→excludes-ACIP). A future refactor that drops one direction trips one of the cases; dropping both trips both.

input.query: Is metformin still safe at this eGFR? What's the contraindication threshold for renal dosing?
